name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn



Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        /\ turn' = i
        /\ IF turn' = i /\ state'[i] = "trying" THEN
            /\ state' = [state' EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
            /\ state' = [state' EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

            /\ UNCHANGED <<state, turn>>


Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision

Init ==
  /\ participants = <<1, 2, 3, 4, 5>>  \* Example with 5 participants
  /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "Pending"]
  /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare ==
  /\ \E p \in participants :
       /\ votes[p] = "Pending"
       /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]

VoteYes ==
  /\ \E p \in participants :
       /\ votes[p] = "Prepared"
       /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]

VoteNo ==
  /\ \E p \in participants :
       /\ votes[p] = "Prepared"
       /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]

Commit ==
  /\ decision = "Pending"
  /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "Yes"
  /\ decision' = "Committed"

Abort ==
  /\ decision = "Pending"
  /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "No"
  /\ decision' = "Aborted"

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
(* States: states[i] = "thinking" | "hungry" | "eating" *)

Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = i
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = %(i, N) + 1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = %(i, N) + 1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] /\ flag[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* TypeOK ensures the queue is a sequence of length <= K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ count \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ count = 0

(* Producer action: enqueues an element if not full *)
Producer == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* placeholder for actual element *)
  /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeues an element if not empty *)
Consumer == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q)
  /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ count' = count - 1

(* Next action: either Producer or Consumer *)
Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS ServerSet

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \/ [x \in ServerSet |-> x]
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = None
          /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
